mapper.select: SELECT p.id as "productId", p.name as "name", p.description as "description", p.short_description as "shortDescription", p.brand as "brand", p.slug as "slug", p.meta_title as "metaTitle", p.meta_description as "metaDescription", c.id as "categoryId", c.name as "categoryName", c.slug as "categorySlug" FROM products p LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.slug = #{slug} AND p."stateId" = 'PUBLISHED'

SELECT pv.id as "variantId", pv.sku as "sku", o.selling_price as "sellingPrice", o.mrp as "mrp", o.discount_percent as "discountPercent", inv.available_quantity as "availableQuantity", CASE WHEN inv.available_quantity > 0 THEN true ELSE false END as "inStock", CASE WHEN inv.available_quantity > 0 AND inv.available_quantity <= inv.low_stock_threshold THEN true ELSE false END as "lowStock" FROM product_variants pv JOIN products p ON pv.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN offers o ON (o.variant_id = pv.id OR (o.variant_id IS NULL AND o.product_id = p.id)) AND o."stateId" = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN inventory_item inv ON inv.variant_id = pv.id WHERE pv.product_id = #{productId} AND p."stateId" = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY o.selling_price ASC

SELECT p.id as "productId", p.name as "name", p.short_description as "shortDescription", p.brand as "brand", p.slug as "slug", pm_img.thumbnail_url as "thumbnailUrl", MIN(o.selling_price) as "minPrice", COALESCE(AVG(r.rating), 0) as "avgRating", COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) as "reviewCount" FROM products p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pm.product_id, ma.thumbnail_url FROM product_media pm JOIN media_assets ma ON ma.id = pm.asset_id WHERE pm.is_primary = true ) pm_img ON pm_img.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN offers o ON o.product_id = p.id AND o."stateId" = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN product_reviews r ON r.product_id = p.id AND r.state_id = 'APPROVED' WHERE p."stateId" = 'PUBLISHED' GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.short_description, p.brand, p.slug, pm_img.thumbnail_url ORDER BY "reviewCount" DESC, "avgRating" DESC ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM orders WHERE customer_id = #{customerId}

SELECT o.id as "orderId", o."stateId" as "orderState", o.total_amount as "totalAmount", o.currency as "currency", o.created_time as "createdTime", o.item_count as "itemCount", s.tracking_number as "trackingNumber", s."stateId" as "shippingState", s.estimated_delivery as "estimatedDelivery" FROM orders o LEFT JOIN shipments s ON s.order_id = o.id WHERE o.customer_id = #{customerId} ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT o.id as "orderId", o."stateId" as "orderState", o.total_amount as "totalAmount", o.subtotal as "subtotal", o.tax_amount as "taxAmount", o.shipping_amount as "shippingAmount", o.discount_amount as "discountAmount", o.currency as "currency", o.created_time as "createdTime", o.shipping_address as "shippingAddress" FROM orders o WHERE o.id = #{orderId} AND o.customer_id = #{customerId}

SELECT oi.id as "lineItemId", oi.variant_id as "variantId", oi.product_id as "productId", p.name as "productName", p.slug as "productSlug", pv.sku as "sku", pm_img.thumbnail_url as "thumbnailUrl", oi.quantity as "quantity", oi.unit_price as "unitPrice", oi.total_price as "totalPrice" FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN product_variants pv ON oi.variant_id = pv.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pm.product_id, ma.thumbnail_url FROM product_media pm JOIN media_assets ma ON ma.id = pm.asset_id WHERE pm.is_primary = true ) pm_img ON pm_img.product_id = p.id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY oi.id
SELECT DISTINCT p.brand as "brand", COUNT(*) as "productCount" FROM products p WHERE p."stateId" = 'PUBLISHED' AND p.brand IS NOT NULL GROUP BY p.brand ORDER BY "productCount" DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN MIN(o.selling_price) < 500 THEN 'Under 500' WHEN MIN(o.selling_price) < 1000 THEN '500 - 1000' WHEN MIN(o.selling_price) < 5000 THEN '1000 - 5000' WHEN MIN(o.selling_price) < 10000 THEN '5000 - 10000' ELSE 'Above 10000' END as "priceRange", COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) as "productCount" FROM products p JOIN offers o ON o.product_id = p.id AND o."stateId" = 'ACTIVE' WHERE p."stateId" = 'PUBLISHED' GROUP BY "priceRange"
